title: BEM-663 dispatch/yaml check
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

def read(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''

def meta(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return {'path':path,'exists':p.exists(),'size':p.stat().st_size if p.exists() else 0}

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return None
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {'parse_error':True,'raw':p.read_text(errors='ignore')[:1000]}

paths={
 'codex_runner':'.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml',
 'telegram_wf':'.github/workflows/telegram-send-smoke.yml',
 'curator_wf':'.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml',
 'dispatch_results':'governance/workflow_dispatch_results',
 'telegram_smoke_state':'governance/state/telegram_send_smoke_result.json',
 'hourly_state':'governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json',
 'delivery_verify':'governance/state/curator_hourly_delivery_verification.json'
}
telegram_text=read(paths['telegram_wf'])
codex_text=read(paths['codex_runner'])
result_files=[]
rd=Path(paths['dispatch_results'])
if rd.exists():
    for p in sorted(rd.glob('*')):
        result_files.append({'path':str(p),'content':read(str(p))[:800]})
checks=[]
checks.append({'name':'codex_dispatch_step_present','pass':'name: Dispatch workflow queue' in codex_text,'evidence':paths['codex_runner']})
checks.append({'name':'codex_actions_write','pass':'  actions: write' in codex_text,'evidence':paths['codex_runner']})
checks.append({'name':'telegram_workflow_exists','pass':Path(paths['telegram_wf']).exists(),'evidence':paths['telegram_wf']})
checks.append({'name':'telegram_no_heredoc','pass':'<<' not in telegram_text,'evidence':paths['telegram_wf']})
checks.append({'name':'telegram_no_shell_ansi_c_newline','pass':"$'" not in telegram_text,'evidence':paths['telegram_wf']})
checks.append({'name':'telegram_no_literal_smoke_marker_at_yaml_top','pass':not any(line.startswith('BEM-') for line in telegram_text.splitlines()),'evidence':paths['telegram_wf']})
smoke=load(paths['telegram_smoke_state'])
hourly=load(paths['hourly_state'])
verify=load(paths['delivery_verify'])
checks.append({'name':'telegram_smoke_result_exists','pass':smoke is not None,'evidence':paths['telegram_smoke_state']})
checks.append({'name':'dispatch_results_exist','pass':len(result_files)>0,'evidence':paths['dispatch_results']})
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='needs_telegram_yaml_repair' if any(x['name'] in ['telegram_no_shell_ansi_c_newline','telegram_no_literal_smoke_marker_at_yaml_top'] and not x['pass'] for x in checks) else ('dispatch_results_pending' if not result_files else 'checked')
blocker=None if status=='checked' and not failed else {'code':'DISPATCH_OR_TELEGRAM_WORKFLOW_ISSUE','failed':failed,'result_files':result_files[:10]}
state={'schema_version':'dispatch_queue_and_telegram_yaml_check.v1','bem':'BEM-663','status':status,'checks':checks,'dispatch_results':result_files,'telegram_workflow_preview':telegram_text.splitlines()[:120],'telegram_smoke_state':smoke,'hourly_state':hourly,'delivery_verify':verify,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:58 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem663_check_dispatch_queue_and_telegram_yaml.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem663_check_dispatch_queue_and_telegram_yaml.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-663 | Dispatch Queue And Telegram YAML Check | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:58 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Dispatch results'+sep+json.dumps(result_files,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem663_check_dispatch_queue_and_telegram_yaml','cycle_id':'bem663-check-dispatch-queue-and-telegram-yaml','source':'monitor','status':status,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:58 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem663_check_dispatch_queue_and_telegram_yaml']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['telegram_delivery_repair_status']=status
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 15:58 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem663_check_dispatch_queue_and_telegram_yaml.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-663: status='+status+' failed='+str(len(failed))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Checked workflow dispatch queue results and telegram-send-smoke YAML safety after screenshot failure')
"""
No issue comments.
